title: Spaghetti
instructions: 1. Boil pasta. 2. Season and cook ground beef in a pan. 3. Combine all.

title: Chicken Stir Fry
instructions: 1. Slice chicken and veggies. 2. Sauté chicken until browned. 3. Add veggies and sauce. 4. Serve over rice.

title: Avocado Toast
instructions: 1. Toast bread. 2. Mash avocado with lemon and salt. 3. Spread on toast and top with flakes.
